title: Wedding Guest Book, Sign in Guest Book for Wedding Reception with Gold Foil and Gilded Edges, 10"x7" Guest Book with Pen and Photo Corner Sticker,Guestbook for Wedding,Baby Shower,Anniversary,Birthday
features: 【Premium Guestbook】Dimensions of wedding guestbook: 10 x 7 inches. Our wedding attendance booklet is elegant with its gold leaf cover and gilt edges. This wedding guest book comes with 1 gold marker and 4 photo corner stickers for your guests to collect photos and send good wishes.

【High Quality】The hardcoverguest book for wedding has a beautiful embossed gold foil design on the white cover, and the surface is sealed with a protective film and metal corner guards to prevent the cover from being scratched. Thickened inner pages can prevent ink from getting on the next page. Exquisite stitching binding, with a bookmark strap, more advanced.

【Ideal Size】The wedding message book has a total of 120 pages/60 sheets, size: 10 x 7 inches. Wedding book can meet the needs of guests signing in at the banquet, and you can get their sincere blessings on important days.

【Wide Use】The guest book signs for wedding is perfect for weddings, anniversaries, parties, baby showers, birthdays and many other events. The guestbook will bring you joy and leave you with warm and sweet memories.
【Excellent Service】If you have any questions about our guest book wedding reception, please feel free to contact us, we will give you a satisfactory reply right away.
description: The book contains 60 page (120 side) with gold frame pattern inside pages, with a minimalist design of blank pages and wireless bars. In addition to the message book, it also comes with a gold highlighter and 4 DIY corner stickers for color photos (102 stickers each), which can hold up to 204 photos. Guest book is suitable for weddings, birthday parties and other events, used to record your precious information, is the best choice to increase the sense of ceremony. Cover size of message book: 26 * 18cm Inner page paper size: 25.4 × 17.5cm Paper thickness: 120g double adhesive paper Paper count: 60 sheets Highlighter: Gold DIY corner stickers for photos: 4 colorful sheets, 102 stickers per sheet, a total of 408 stickers
